title: Create: Blaze Burner Fuels
description: A Create addon that adds new fuel sources for Blaze Burners, increasing automation possibilities.
body:
About

This Create addon adds a variety of items and recipes, introducing new fuel sources for Blaze Burners and giving players unique ways to build Steam Boiler setups.

Ever wanted a renewable alternative to Blaze Cakes? Now you have one!

All additions have been carefully balanced to not overshadow existing fuels like lava and coal, while encouraging players to explore new options for heat generation with Create.

Item list

Detailed content

Show spoiler

New items
- Kindling Sticks (burns for 400 ticks)
- Wood Dust
- Wood Pellets (burns for 600 ticks)
- Fiery Coal (burns for 4800 ticks)
- Fiery Charcoal (burns for 4800 ticks)
- Coal Briquettes (burns for 1000 ticks)
- Charoal Briquettes (burns for 1000 ticks)
- Blazing Rocks (burns for 3600 ticks)
- Coal Coke (burns for 2400 ticks)
- Refined Coal Coke (burns for 3200 ticks)
- Peat
- Peat Briquettes (burns for 3200 ticks)
- Dung Brick (burns for 800 ticks)
- Compost
- Inactive Blaze Core
- Blaze Core (burns for 8200 ticks)
- Superheated Blaze Core (superheating properties - burns for 8200 ticks)

New blocks
- Stick Bundle (burns for 3600 ticks)
- Makeshift Trapdoor (burns for 1600 ticks)
- Peat Bricks
- Peat Brick Stairs
- Peat Brick Slab
- Peat Brick Wall

Vanilla additions

Show spoiler

Some vanilla blocks/items can now be used as fuel:
- Hay Bale (burns for 1200 ticks)
- Wheat (burns for 100 ticks)
- Gunpowder (burns for 600 ticks)
- Blaze Powder (burns for 1000 ticks)
- Fire Charge (burns for 1600 ticks)
- Paper (burns for 100 ticks)
- Book and Quill (burns for 300 ticks)
- Book (burns for 300 ticks)
- Written Book (burns for 300 ticks)
- Enchanted Book (burns for 300 ticks)

Easter egg

Show spoiler

You can throw Dung Bricks at your enemies!

Credits

All custom textures used (if any) are either created by me or have a license that allows modification and distribution.

I make every effort to comply with project license obligations and to always credit the original owners. If you believe your name is missing from the credits or if you decide to change your project's license, please contact me.

Credits:
- Futureazoo's Repository (CC License) for the fiery coal item.
- Malcolmriley's Repository (CC License) as base template for most of the other blocks and items.

Dependencies

Only the base Create mod is required for this one to work.

JEI is recommended but not required.

Installation

Add the .jar mod file into your mods folder.

Alternatively, you can browse the Modrinth launcher for the mod (if it doesn't show up, try typing the autor's name). Once found, click "Install" to add it to your modpack.

Permissions

You are free to include this mod in any modpack, public or private.

Support my work
